description_long: This is a modern, full-size SUV with a robust and angular body, finished in a glossy white paint with black accents on the roof, wheels, and window trim. The front features a bold grille with a prominent Nissan badge, flanked by sharp, angular headlights and red accents on the lower bumper. The side profile reveals large, black multi-spoke wheels, flush door handles, and subtle chrome trim along the lower edge of the doors. The rear is characterized by sleek taillights, a rear spoiler, dual exhaust pipes, and a visible license plate area. The windows are heavily tinted, and the roofline is slightly raised, suggesting ample interior space for passengers and cargo. The overall design is sporty yet practical, suitable for both urban and suburban environments.
description: A white, modern SUV with black accents, large multi-spoke wheels, and a bold front grille, featuring sporty red highlights and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, Nissan badge, angular headlights, and red bumper accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large black wheels, flush door handles, and chrome trim along the lower doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displays sleek taillights, a rear spoiler, dual exhaust pipes, and the license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same wheel design, door handles, and chrome trim.
attribute_wheel_design: black, multi-spoke rims with a geometric, angular pattern
